description: Block direct docker mutations — use your stack manager (Komodo, Portainer, etc.)
managedPath: Use your Docker stack manager (Komodo, Portainer, etc.) for all container operations
blockMessage: 🛡️ Docker mutations blocked. Use your stack manager for container management.

description: Block git operations in workspace directory
managedPath: Clone to /tmp/ first, then copy needed files to workspace
blockMessage: 🛡️ Git operations blocked in workspace. Clone to /tmp/ first.

managedPath: Ask for explicit confirmation before destructive operations on workspace
blockMessage: 🛡️ Recursive deletion of workspace blocked. Ask for explicit confirmation.

managedPath: Stage files in user-writable paths, print the sudo command for your human to run
blockMessage: 🛡️ Sudo blocked. Stage the files and provide the command for your human to run.

description: Block direct edits to generated skill files — use your skill generator
managedPath: Update your skill DB/generator, then regenerate. Skill MDs are generated output.
blockMessage: 🛡️ Skill files are generated — don't edit directly.

description: Block email write/forward/delete — read-only access only
managedPath: Email is read-only. Ask your human to send/forward/delete manually.
blockMessage: 🛡️ Email write operations blocked — read-only access.

description: Block direct gateway restart — use an approval workflow
managedPath: Use an approval workflow for gateway restarts.
blockMessage: 🛡️ Direct gateway restart blocked. Use your restart workflow.

description: Block agent from self-approving Lobster approval gates
managedPath: Send the approval request to your human. Agents should not self-approve.
blockMessage: 🛡️ Self-approval blocked. Route approval requests to your human.
